properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your Love wakes me up And gives me life You are the air that I'm breathing in You are always there For me oh God There's nothing that I could ask for

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want more of You And less of me In my life I want more of You And less of me In my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You love me Lord, More than I could ask for And that's why I long for You You embrace me Lord Embrace me with Your mercy Oh I am in love with You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You touch my heart And changed my life In Your mercy I found my peace You died for me And set me free In Your suffering you give me life
